 = wavelength / 2.0\n13\t\tsubcarrierSpacing = 312.5e3 // Hz\n14\t\tc                 = 3e8     // speed of light m/s\n15\t\n16\t\t// CSI frame constants — must match ingestion/frame.go (ingestion/frame.go):\n31\t//\n32\t//\tHeader (24 bytes fixed):\n33\t//\t  [0:6]   node_mac     — TX node MAC address\n34\t//\t  [6:12]  peer_mac     — RX node MAC address\n35\t//\t  [12:20] walls)\n45\t\n46\t\t// Compute RSSI from amplitude\n47\t\trssi := amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude)\n48\t\n49\t\t// Create frame buffer (headerSize=24 defined in main.go)\n50\t\tframe := make([]byte, headerSize+nSub*2)\n51\t\n52\t\t// Write header (matches ingestion/frame.go ParseFrame layout)\n53\t\tcopy(frame[0:6], tx.MAC[:])   // node_mac\n54\t\tcopy(frame[6:12], rx.MAC[:])  // byte(noiseFloor) // noise_floor: -95 dBm\n59\t\tframe[22] = byte(*flagChannel) // channel (from --channel flag)\n60\t\tframe[23] = nSub              // n_sub\n61\t\n62\t\t// Generate I/Q pairs for math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(frameNum)/100.0)\n69\t\n70\t\t\t// Normalize phase to [-π, π]\n71\t\t\tfor phase > math.Pi {\n72\t\t\t\tphase -= 2 * math.Pi\n73\t\t\t}\n74\t\t\tfor phase < -math.Pi {\n75\t\t\t\tphase += 2 * math.Pi\n76\t\t\t}\n77\t\n78\t\t\t// Add frequency-selective fading\n79\t\t\tfreqFading := 0.8 + 0.4*math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(k)/16.0)\n80\t\t\tsubAmplitude := amplitude * freqFading\n81\t\n82\t\t\t// Generate I/Q with noise\n83\t\t\ti, q := generateIQPair(subAmplitude, phase, rng)\n84\t\n85\t\t\t// Write to payload (interleaved I,Q)\n86\t\t\toffset := headerSize + k*2\n87\t\t\tframe[offset] = byte(i)\n88\t\t\tframe[offset+1] = byte(q)\n89\t\t}\n90\t\n91\t\treturn frame\n92\t}\n93\t\n94\t// computeCSIForWalkers computes the combined CSI amplitude and phase from all walkers\n95\t// using a two-ray propagation model (direct path + first-order reflection).\n96\tfunc computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n97\t\tif len(walkers) == 0 {\n98\t\t\t// No walkers, return baseline noise\n99\t\t\treturn 0.001, 0.0\n100\t\t}\n101\t\n102\t\tvar totalAmplitude float64\n103\t\tvar totalPhase float64\n104\t\tvar weight float64\n105\t\n106\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n107\t\t\t// Direct path contribution\n108\t\t\tdirectAmp, directPhase := computeDirectPath(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n109\t\n110\t\t\t// First-order reflection contribution (strongest reflected ray)\n111\t\t\treflAmp, reflPhase := computeFirstOrderReflection(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n112\t\n113\t\t\t// Combine direct and reflected paths (coherent sum for two-ray model)\n114\t\t\t// The reflected ray interferes with the direct ray, creating constructive/destructive interference\n115\t\t\tcombinedAmp := directAmp + reflAmp*math.Cos(directPhase-reflPhase)\n116\t\t\tcombinedPhase := math.Atan2(\n117\t\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Sin(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Sin(reflPhase),\n118\t\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Cos(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Cos(reflPhase),\n119\t\t\t)\n120\t\n121\t\t\t// Scale to reasonable values\n122\t\t\tcombinedAmp *= 1000.0\n123\t\n124\t\t\t// Accumulate\n125\t\t\ttotalAmplitude += combinedAmp\n126\t\t\ttotalPhase += combinedPhase\n127\t\t\tweight += 1.0\n128\t\t}\n129\t\n130\t\t// Normalize phase\n131\t\tif weight > 0 {\n132\t\t\ttotalPhase /= weight\n133\t\t}\n134\t\n135\t\treturn totalAmplitude, totalPhase\n136\t}\n137\t\n138\t// computeDirectPath computes the CSI contribution from the direct path\n139\t// through the walker to the receiver, using the log-distance path loss model.\n140\tfunc computeDirectPath(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n141\t\t// Distance from TX to walker\n142\t\td1 := distance(tx, walker)\n143\t\t// Distance from walker to RX\n144\t\td2 := distance(walker, rx)\n145\t\t// Total path length\n146\t\tdTotal := d1 + d2\n147\t\n148\t\t// Direct TX-RX distance (for Fresnel zone calculation)\n149\t\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n150\t\n151\t\t// Path length excess for Fresnel zone calculation\n152\t\texcess := dTotal - dDirect\n153\t\tif excess < 0 {\n154\t\t\texcess = 0\n155\t\t}\n156\t\n157\t\t// Fresnel zone number\n158\t\tzoneNumber := int(math.Ceil(excess / halfWavelength))\n159\t\tif zoneNumber < 1 {\n160\t\t\tzoneNumber = 1\n161\t\t}\n162\t\n163\t\t// Zone decay (inverse square)\n164\t\tdecay := 1.0 / math.Pow(float64(zoneNumber), 2.0)\n165\t\n166\t\t// Log-distance path loss model: PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n167\t\tvar pathLossDB float64\n168\t\tif dTotal >= d0 {\n169\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dTotal/d0)\n170\t\t} else {\n171\t\t\t// For distances < d0, use free space approximation\n172\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n173\t\t}\n174\t\n175\t\t// Wall attenuation on the direct path\n176\t\twallLoss := computeWallLoss(tx, walker, walls)\n177\t\twallLoss += computeWallLoss(walker, rx, walls)\n178\t\n179\t\t// Total loss in dB\n180\t\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n181\t\n182\t\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n183\t\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n184\t\n185\t\t// Apply Fresnel zone decay\n186\t\tamplitude *= decay\n187\t\n188\t\t// Phase at this position (based on total path length)\n189\t\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dTotal / wavelength\n190\t\n191\t\treturn amplitude, phase\n192\t}\n193\t\n194\t// computeFirstOrderReflection computes the CSI contribution from the strongest\n195\t// first-order reflection off a wall segment. Uses image method to find reflection point.\n196\tfunc computeFirstOrderReflection(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n197\t\tvar bestReflAmp float64\n198\t\tvar bestReflPhase float64\n199\t\tvar foundReflection bool\n200\t\n201\t\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n202\t\t\t// Compute reflection point using image method\n203\t\t\treflPoint, ok := findReflectionPoint(tx, rx, wall)\n204\t\t\tif !ok {\n205\t\t\t\tcontinue\n206\t\t\t}\n207\t\n208\t\t\t// Reflected path: TX -> reflection point -> RX\n209\t\t\tdTxRefl := distance(tx, reflPoint)\n210\t\t\tdReflRx := distance(reflPoint, rx)\n211\t\t\tdReflTotal := dTxRefl + dReflRx\n212\t\n213\t\t\t// Direct path length (for comparison)\n214\t\t\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n215\t\n216\t\t\t// Log-distance path loss for reflected path\n217\t\t\tvar pathLossDB float64\n218\t\t\tif dReflTotal >= d0 {\n219\t\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dReflTotal/d0)\n220\t\t\t} else {\n221\t\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n222\t\t\t}\n223\t\n224\t\t\t// Wall attenuation (transmission loss through wall if any)\n225\t\t\t// Plus reflection loss (weakest material first = lowest attenuation)\n226\t\t\twallLoss := wall.Attenuation\n227\t\n228\t\t\t// Total loss in dB\n229\t\t\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n230\t\n231\t\t\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n232\t\t\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n233\t\n234\t\t\t// Apply reflection coefficient (power coefficient)\n235\t\t\tamplitude *= math.Sqrt(reflectionCoeff)\n236\t\n237\t\t\t// Normalize by direct path loss (so reflected ray is relative to direct)\n238\t\t\tdirectPathLoss := pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dDirect/d0)\n239\t\t\tamplitude *= math.Pow(10.0, (directPathLoss-pathLossDB)/20.0)\n240\t\n241\t\t\t// Phase based on reflected path length\n242\t\t\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dReflTotal / wavelength\n243\t\n244\t\t\t// Keep the strongest reflection (lowest attenuation)\n245\t\t\tif !foundReflection || amplitude > bestReflAmp {\n246\t\t\t\tbestReflAmp = amplitude\n247\t\t\t\tbestReflPhase = phase\n248\t\t\t\tfoundReflection = true\n249\t\t\t}\n250\t\t}\n251\t\n252\t\tif !foundReflection {\n253\t\t\treturn 0, 0\n254\t\t}\n255\t\n256\t\treturn bestReflAmp, bestReflPhase\n257\t}\n258\t\n259\t// findReflectionPoint finds the specular reflection point on a wall segment\n260\t// for a ray from TX to RX using the image method.\n261\t// Returns the reflection point and true if a valid reflection exists, false otherwise.\n262\tfunc findReflectionPoint(tx, rx Point, wall Wall) (Point, bool) {\n263\t\t// For a vertical wall segment (in 2D floor plane), the reflection point\n264\t\t// is found by reflecting the TX across the wall line and finding the\n265\t\t// intersection with the wall segment.\n266\t\n267\t\t// Wall line equation: ax + by + c = 0\n268\t\t// For vertical wall from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2):\n269\t\t// If x1 == x2 (vertical wall), reflection is straightforward\n270\t\tif math.Abs(wall.X1-wall.X2) < 1e-6 {\n271\t\t\t// Vertical wall at x = wall.X1\n272\t\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n273\t\t\treflTxX := 2*wall.X1 - tx.X\n274\t\t\treflTxY := tx.Y\n275\t\n276\t\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n277\t\t\t// Parametric line: reflTx + t*(rx - reflTx)\n278\t\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n279\t\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n280\t\n281\t\t\tif math.Abs(dx) < 1e-6 {\n282\t\t\t\t// Line is vertical, no intersection with vertical wall (or parallel)\n283\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n284\t\t\t}\n285\t\n286\t\t\tt := (wall.X1 - reflTxX) / dx\n287\t\n288\t\t\t// Compute intersection point\n289\t\t\tintersectY := reflTxY + t*dy\n290\t\n291\t\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n292\t\t\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n293\t\t\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n294\t\n295\t\t\tif intersectY < minY || intersectY > maxY {\n296\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n297\t\t\t}\n298\t\n299\t\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z (reflection in vertical plane)\n300\t\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n301\t\n302\t\t\treturn Point{X: wall.X1, Y: intersectY, Z: intersectZ}, true\n303\t\t}\n304\t\n305\t\t// For horizontal wall segment (y1 == y2)\n306\t\tif math.Abs(wall.Y1-wall.Y2) < 1e-6 {\n307\t\t\t// Horizontal wall at y = wall.Y1\n308\t\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n309\t\t\treflTxX := tx.X\n310\t\t\treflTxY := 2*wall.Y1 - tx.Y\n311\t\n312\t\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n313\t\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n314\t\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n315\t\n316\t\t\tif math.Abs(dy) < 1e-6 {\n317\t\t\t\t// Line is horizontal, no intersection\n318\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n319\t\t\t}\n320\t\n321\t\t\tt := (wall.Y1 - reflTxY) / dy\n322\t\n323\t\t\t// Compute intersection point\n324\t\t\tintersectX := reflTxX + t*dx\n325\t\n326\t\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n327\t\t\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n328\t\t\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n329\t\n330\t\t\tif intersectX < minX || intersectX > maxX {\n331\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n332\t\t\t}\n333\t\n334\t\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n335\t\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n336\t\n337\t\t\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: wall.Y1, Z: intersectZ}, true\n338\t\t}\n339\t\n340\t\t// General case: angled wall segment\n341\t\t// Compute line intersection\n342\t\t// Wall line: (x1, y1) to (x2, y2)\n343\t\t// Ray from reflected TX to RX\n344\t\n345\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall line\n346\t\treflTx := reflectPointAcrossLine(tx, Point{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0})\n347\t\n348\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall line\n349\t\tintersect, ok := lineIntersection(\n350\t\t\treflTx, rx,\n351\t\t\tPoint{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0},\n352\t\t)\n353\t\tif !ok {\n354\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n355\t\t}\n356\t\n357\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n358\t\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n359\t\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n360\t\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n361\t\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n362\t\n363\t\tif intersect.X < minX || intersect.X > maxX || intersect.Y < minY || intersect.Y > maxY {\n364\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n365\t\t}\n366\t\n367\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n368\t\tintersect.Z = (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n369\t\n370\t\treturn intersect, true\n371\t}\n372\t\n373\t// reflectPointAcrossLine reflects a point across a line defined by two points.\n374\t// Uses the formula for reflection of a point across a line in 2D.\n375\tfunc reflectPointAcrossLine(p, lineStart, lineEnd Point) Point {\n376\t\t// Line direction vector\n377\t\tlx := lineEnd.X - lineStart.X\n378\t\tly := lineEnd.Y - lineStart.Y\n379\t\n380\t\t// Vector from line start to point\n381\t\tpx := p.X - lineStart.X\n382\t\tpy := p.Y - lineStart.Y\n383\t\n384\t\t// Project p onto the line (dot product)\n385\t\tdot := px*lx + py*ly\n386\t\tlenSq := lx*lx + ly*ly\n387\t\n388\t\tif lenSq < 1e-10 {\n389\t\t\t// Line segment is too short\n390\t\t\treturn p\n391\t\t}\n392\t\n393\t\t// Projection parameter\n394\t\tt := dot / lenSq\n395\t\n396\t\t// Closest point on line\n397\t\tclosestX := lineStart.X + t*lx\n398\t\tclosestY := lineStart.Y + t*ly\n399\t\n400\t\t// Reflected point: p' = closest + (closest - p) = 2*closest - p\n401\t\treturn Point{\n402\t\t\tX: 2*closestX - p.X,\n403\t\t\tY: 2*closestY - p.Y,\n404\t\t\tZ: p.Z,\n405\t\t}\n406\t}\n407\t\n408\t// lineIntersection finds the intersection point of two line segments in 2D.\n409\t// Returns the intersection point and true if the lines intersect, false otherwise.\n410\tfunc lineIntersection(p1, p2, p3, p4 Point) (Point, bool) {\n411\t\t// Line 1: p1 to p2\n412\t\t// Line 2: p3 to p4\n413\t\n414\t\tx1, y1 := p1.X, p1.Y\n415\t\tx2, y2 := p2.X, p2.Y\n416\t\tx3, y3 := p3.X, p3.Y\n417\t\tx4, y4 := p4.X, p4.Y\n418\t\n419\t\t// Compute denominator\n420\t\tdenom := (x1-x2)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y2)*(x3-x4)\n421\t\tif math.Abs(denom) < 1e-10 {\n422\t\t\t// Lines are parallel\n423\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n424\t\t}\n425\t\n426\t\t// Compute intersection point using parametric form\n427\t\tt := ((x1-x3)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y3)*(x3-x4)) / denom\n428\t\tu := -((x1-x2)*(y1-y3) - (y1-y2)*(x1-x3)) / denom\n429\t\n430\t\t// Check if intersection is within both line segments\n431\t\tif t < 0 || t > 1 || u < 0 || u > 1 {\n432\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n433\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\t// Compute intersection point\n436\t\tintersectX := x1 + t*(x2-x1)\n437\t\tintersectY := y1 + t*(y2-y1)\n438\t\n439\t\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: intersectY}, true\n440\t}\n441\t\n442\t// distance computes Euclidean distance between two points\n443\tfunc distance(a, b Point) float64 {\n444\t\tdx := a.X - b.X\n445\t\tdy := a.Y - b.Y\n446\t\tdz := a.Z - b.Z\n447\t\treturn math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n448\t}\n449\t\n450\t// computeWallLoss computes wall attenuation for a path through all walls.\n451\t// For each wall the path intersects, add the wall's attenuation value.\n452\tfunc computeWallLoss(from, to Point, walls []Wall) float64 {\n453\t\ttotalLoss := 0.0\n454\t\n455\t\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n456\t\t\tif pathIntersectsWall(from.X, from.Y, to.X, to.Y, wall.X1, wall.Y1, wall.X2, wall.Y2) {\n457\t\t\t\ttotalLoss += wall.Attenuation\n458\t\t\t}\n459\t\t}\n460\t\n461\t\treturn totalLoss\n462\t}\n463\t\n464\t// pathIntersectsWall checks if a path intersects a wall segment (2D)\n465\tfunc pathIntersectsWall(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2 float64) bool {\n466\t\t// Compute orientations\n467\t\tccw := func(ax, ay, bx, by, cx, cy float64) float64 {\n468\t\t\treturn (bx-ax)*(cy-ay) - (by-ay)*(cx-ax)\n469\t\t}\n470\t\n471\t\to1 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1)\n472\t\to2 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx2, wy2)\n473\t\to3 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x1, y1)\n474\t\to4 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x2, y2)\n475\t\n476\t\t// Check for intersection\n477\t\treturn o1*o2 < 0 && o3*o4 < 0\n478\t}\n479\t\n480\t// amplitudeToRSSI converts amplitude to RSSI in dBm\n481\tfunc amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude float64) int8 {\n482\t\t// Convert amplitude to dBm (reference: amplitude 1.0 = -30 dBm)\n483\t\tamplitudeDBm := -30.0 + 20.0*math.Log10(amplitude)\n484\t\n485\t\t// Clamp to realistic range\n486\t\tif amplitudeDBm < -90 {\n487\t\t\tamplitudeDBm = -90\n488\t\t}\n489\t\tif amplitudeDBm > -30 {\n490\t\t\tamplitudeDBm = -30\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\treturn int8(amplitudeDBm)\n494\t}\n495\t\n496\t// generateIQPair generates a synthetic I/Q pair with Gaussian noise\n497\tfunc generateIQPair(amplitude, phase float64, rng *rand.Rand) (int8, int8) {\n498\t\t// Box-Muller transform for Gaussian noise\n499\t\tu1 := rng.Float64()\n500\t\tu2 := rng.Float64()\n501\t\tz0 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Cos(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n502\t\tz1 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Sin(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n503\t\n504\t\tnoiseI := z0 * *flagNoiseSigma\n505\t\tnoiseQ := z1 * *flagNoiseSigma\n506\t\n507\t\t// Convert to I/Q\n508\t\ti := amplitude*math.Cos(phase) + noiseI\n509\t\tq := amplitude*math.Sin(phase) + noiseQ\n510\t\n511\t\t// Scale to int8 range\n512\t\tscale := 127.0 / 10.0 // Scale factor\n513\t\ti *= scale\n514\t\tq *= scale\n515\t\n516\t\t// Clamp to int8 range [-127, 127]\n517\t\tif i > 127 {\n518\t\t\ti = 127\n519\t\t}\n520\t\tif i < -127 {\n521\t\t\ti = -127\n522\t\t}\n523\t\tif q > 127 {\n524\t\t\tq = 127\n525\t\t}\n526\t\tif q < -127 {\n527\t\t\tq = -127\n528\t\t}\n529\t\n530\t\treturn int8(i), int8(q)\n531\t}\n532\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"f4b14098-bcf4-41f7-b291-a83ac1750e10","uuid":"5f41319c-9eac-425e-9123-2a78b2462c54","timestamp":"2026-05-06T03:12:33.923Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/cmd/sim/generator.go","content":"package main\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/binary\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\t// WiFi physical constants\n\twavelength        = 0.123     // meters (2.4 GHz)\n\thalfWavelength    = wavelength / 2.0\n\tsubcarrierSpacing = 312.5e3 // Hz\n\tc                 = 3e8     // speed of light m/s\n\n\t// CSI frame constants — must match ingestion/frame.go format\n\tnSub = 64 // number of subcarriers for HT20\n\n\t// Path loss model constants (log-distance model)\n\t// PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n\tpl0    = 40.0 // dBm reference power at d0\n\td0     = 1.0   // meters reference distance\n\tn      = 2.0   // path loss exponent (free space)\n\n\t// Reflection coefficient (power, dimensionless)\n\treflectionCoeff = 0.3\n)\n\n// generateCSIFrame generates a synthetic CSI binary frame.\n// The frame format matches the ingestion layer (ingestion/frame.go):\n//\n//\tHeader (24 bytes fixed):\n//\t  [0:6]   node_mac     — TX node MAC address\n//\t  [6:12]  peer_mac     — RX node MAC address\n//\t  [12:20] timestamp_us — uint64 LE, microseconds since node boot\n//\t  [20]    rssi         — int8, dBm\n//\t  [21]    noise_floor  — int8, dBm\n//\t  [22]    channel      — uint8, WiFi channel\n//\t  [23]    n_sub        — uint8, subcarrier count\n//\tPayload (n_sub × 2 bytes):\n//\t  Per subcarrier: int8 I, int8 Q\nfunc generateCSIFrame(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall, frameNum int, rng *rand.Rand) []byte {\n\t// Calculate combined CSI from all walkers\n\tamplitude, phaseBase := computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx, walkers, walls)\n\n\t// Compute RSSI from amplitude\n\trssi := amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude)\n\n\t// Create frame buffer (headerSize=24 defined in main.go)\n\tframe := make([]byte, headerSize+nSub*2)\n\n\t// Write header (matches ingestion/frame.go ParseFrame layout)\n\tcopy(frame[0:6], tx.MAC[:])   // node_mac\n\tcopy(frame[6:12], rx.MAC[:])  // peer_mac\n\tbinary.LittleEndian.PutUint64(frame[12:20], uint64(frameNum*50000)) // timestamp_us\n\tframe[20] = byte(rssi)        // rssi\n\tvar noiseFloor int8 = -95\n\tframe[21] = byte(noiseFloor) // noise_floor: -95 dBm\n\tframe[22] = byte(*flagChannel) // channel (from --channel flag)\n\tframe[23] = nSub              // n_sub\n\n\t// Generate I/Q pairs for each subcarrier\n\tfor k := 0; k < nSub; k++ {\n\t\t// Phase for this subcarrier\n\t\tphase := phaseBase + float64(k)*0.1\n\n\t\t// Add temporal variation\n\t\tphase += 0.1 * math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(frameNum)/100.0)\n\n\t\t// Normalize phase to [-π, π]\n\t\tfor phase > math.Pi {\n\t\t\tphase -= 2 * math.Pi\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor phase < -math.Pi {\n\t\t\tphase += 2 * math.Pi\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Add frequency-selective fading\n\t\tfreqFading := 0.8 + 0.4*math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(k)/16.0)\n\t\tsubAmplitude := amplitude * freqFading\n\n\t\t// Generate I/Q with noise\n\t\ti, q := generateIQPair(subAmplitude, phase, rng)\n\n\t\t// Write to payload (interleaved I,Q)\n\t\toffset := headerSize + k*2\n\t\tframe[offset] = byte(i)\n\t\tframe[offset+1] = byte(q)\n\t}\n\n\treturn frame\n}\n\n// computeCSIForWalkers computes the combined CSI amplitude and phase from all walkers\n// using a two-ray propagation model (direct path + first-order reflection).\nfunc computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n\tif len(walkers) == 0 {\n\t\t// No walkers, return baseline noise\n\t\treturn 0.001, 0.0\n\t}\n\n\tvar totalAmplitude float64\n\tvar totalPhase float64\n\tvar weight float64\n\n\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\t// Direct path contribution\n\t\tdirectAmp, directPhase := computeDirectPath(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n\n\t\t// First-order reflection contribution (strongest reflected ray)\n\t\treflAmp, reflPhase := computeFirstOrderReflection(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n\n\t\t// Combine direct and reflected paths (coherent sum for two-ray model)\n\t\t// The reflected ray interferes with the direct ray, creating constructive/destructive interference\n\t\tcombinedAmp := directAmp + reflAmp*math.Cos(directPhase-reflPhase)\n\t\tcombinedPhase := math.Atan2(\n\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Sin(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Sin(reflPhase),\n\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Cos(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Cos(reflPhase),\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// Scale to reasonable values\n\t\tcombinedAmp *= 1000.0\n\n\t\t// Accumulate\n\t\ttotalAmplitude += combinedAmp\n\t\ttotalPhase += combinedPhase\n\t\tweight += 1.0\n\t}\n\n\t// Normalize phase\n\tif weight > 0 {\n\t\ttotalPhase /= weight\n\t}\n\n\treturn totalAmplitude, totalPhase\n}\n\n// computeDirectPath computes the CSI contribution from the direct path\n// through the walker to the receiver, using the log-distance path loss model.\nfunc computeDirectPath(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n\t// Distance from TX to walker\n\td1 := distance(tx, walker)\n\t// Distance from walker to RX\n\td2 := distance(walker, rx)\n\t// Total path length\n\tdTotal := d1 + d2\n\n\t// Direct TX-RX distance (for Fresnel zone calculation)\n\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n\n\t// Path length excess for Fresnel zone calculation\n\texcess := dTotal - dDirect\n\tif excess < 0 {\n\t\texcess = 0\n\t}\n\n\t// Fresnel zone number\n\tzoneNumber := int(math.Ceil(excess / halfWavelength))\n\tif zoneNumber < 1 {\n\t\tzoneNumber = 1\n\t}\n\n\t// Zone decay (inverse square)\n\tdecay := 1.0 / math.Pow(float64(zoneNumber), 2.0)\n\n\t// Log-distance path loss model: PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n\tvar pathLossDB float64\n\tif dTotal >= d0 {\n\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dTotal/d0)\n\t} else {\n\t\t// For distances < d0, use free space approximation\n\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n\t}\n\n\t// Wall attenuation on the direct path\n\twallLoss := computeWallLoss(tx, walker, walls)\n\twallLoss += computeWallLoss(walker, rx, walls)\n\n\t// Total loss in dB\n\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n\n\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n\n\t// Apply Fresnel zone decay\n\tamplitude *= decay\n\n\t// Phase at this position (based on total path length)\n\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dTotal / wavelength\n\n\treturn amplitude, phase\n}\n\n// computeFirstOrderReflection computes the CSI contribution from the strongest\n// first-order reflection off a wall segment. Uses image method to find reflection point.\nfunc computeFirstOrderReflection(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n\tvar bestReflAmp float64\n\tvar bestReflPhase float64\n\tvar foundReflection bool\n\n\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n\t\t// Compute reflection point using image method\n\t\treflPoint, ok := findReflectionPoint(tx, rx, wall)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Reflected path: TX -> reflection point -> RX\n\t\tdTxRefl := distance(tx, reflPoint)\n\t\tdReflRx := distance(reflPoint, rx)\n\t\tdReflTotal := dTxRefl + dReflRx\n\n\t\t// Direct path length (for comparison)\n\t\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n\n\t\t// Log-distance path loss for reflected path\n\t\tvar pathLossDB float64\n\t\tif dReflTotal >= d0 {\n\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dReflTotal/d0)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Wall attenuation (transmission loss through wall if any)\n\t\t// Plus reflection loss (weakest material first = lowest attenuation)\n\t\twallLoss := wall.Attenuation\n\n\t\t// Total loss in dB\n\t\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n\n\t\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n\t\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n\n\t\t// Apply reflection coefficient (power coefficient)\n\t\tamplitude *= math.Sqrt(reflectionCoeff)\n\n\t\t// Normalize by direct path loss (so reflected ray is relative to direct)\n\t\tdirectPathLoss := pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dDirect/d0)\n\t\tamplitude *= math.Pow(10.0, (directPathLoss-pathLossDB)/20.0)\n\n\t\t// Phase based on reflected path length\n\t\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dReflTotal / wavelength\n\n\t\t// Keep the strongest reflection (lowest attenuation)\n\t\tif !foundReflection || amplitude > bestReflAmp {\n\t\t\tbestReflAmp = amplitude\n\t\t\tbestReflPhase = phase\n\t\t\tfoundReflection = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !foundReflection {\n\t\treturn 0, 0\n\t}\n\n\treturn bestReflAmp, bestReflPhase\n}\n\n// findReflectionPoint finds the specular reflection point on a wall segment\n// for a ray from TX to RX using the image method.\n// Returns the reflection point and true if a valid reflection exists, false otherwise.\nfunc findReflectionPoint(tx, rx Point, wall Wall) (Point, bool) {\n\t// For a vertical wall segment (in 2D floor plane), the reflection point\n\t// is found by reflecting the TX across the wall line and finding the\n\t// intersection with the wall segment.\n\n\t// Wall line equation: ax + by + c = 0\n\t// For vertical wall from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2):\n\t// If x1 == x2 (vertical wall), reflection is straightforward\n\tif math.Abs(wall.X1-wall.X2) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t// Vertical wall at x = wall.X1\n\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n\t\treflTxX := 2*wall.X1 - tx.X\n\t\treflTxY := tx.Y\n\n\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n\t\t// Parametric line: reflTx + t*(rx - reflTx)\n\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n\n\t\tif math.Abs(dx) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t\t// Line is vertical, no intersection with vertical wall (or parallel)\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tt := (wall.X1 - reflTxX) / dx\n\n\t\t// Compute intersection point\n\t\tintersectY := reflTxY + t*dy\n\n\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n\t\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\t\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\n\t\tif intersectY < minY || intersectY > maxY {\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z (reflection in vertical plane)\n\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n\n\t\treturn Point{X: wall.X1, Y: intersectY, Z: intersectZ}, true\n\t}\n\n\t// For horizontal wall segment (y1 == y2)\n\tif math.Abs(wall.Y1-wall.Y2) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t// Horizontal wall at y = wall.Y1\n\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n\t\treflTxX := tx.X\n\t\treflTxY := 2*wall.Y1 - tx.Y\n\n\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n\n\t\tif math.Abs(dy) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t\t// Line is horizontal, no intersection\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tt := (wall.Y1 - reflTxY) / dy\n\n\t\t// Compute intersection point\n\t\tintersectX := reflTxX + t*dx\n\n\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n\t\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\t\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\n\t\tif intersectX < minX || intersectX > maxX {\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n\n\t\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: wall.Y1, Z: intersectZ}, true\n\t}\n\n\t// General case: angled wall segment\n\t// Compute line intersection\n\t// Wall line: (x1, y1) to (x2, y2)\n\t// Ray from reflected TX to RX\n\n\t// Reflect TX across the wall line\n\treflTx := reflectPointAcrossLine(tx, Point{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0})\n\n\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall line\n\tintersect, ok := lineIntersection(\n\t\treflTx, rx,\n\t\tPoint{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0},\n\t)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\n\tif intersect.X < minX || intersect.X > maxX || intersect.Y < minY || intersect.Y > maxY {\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n\tintersect.Z = (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n\n\treturn intersect, true\n}\n\n// reflectPointAcrossLine reflects a point across a line defined by two points.\n// Uses the formula for reflection of a point across a line in 2D.\nfunc reflectPointAcrossLine(p, lineStart, lineEnd Point) Point {\n\t// Line direction vector\n\tlx := lineEnd.X - lineStart.X\n\tly := lineEnd.Y - lineStart.Y\n\n\t// Vector from line start to point\n\tpx := p.X - lineStart.X\n\tpy := p.Y - lineStart.Y\n\n\t// Project p onto the line (dot product)\n\tdot := px*lx + py*ly\n\tlenSq := lx*lx + ly*ly\n\n\tif lenSq < 1e-10 {\n\t\t// Line segment is too short\n\t\treturn p\n\t}\n\n\t// Projection parameter\n\tt := dot / lenSq\n\n\t// Closest point on line\n\tclosestX := lineStart.X + t*lx\n\tclosestY := lineStart.Y + t*ly\n\n\t// Reflected point: p' = closest + (closest - p) = 2*closest - p\n\treturn Point{\n\t\tX: 2*closestX - p.X,\n\t\tY: 2*closestY - p.Y,\n\t\tZ: p.Z,\n\t}\n}\n\n// lineIntersection finds the intersection point of two line segments in 2D.\n// Returns the intersection point and true if the lines intersect, false otherwise.\nfunc lineIntersection(p1, p2, p3, p4 Point) (Point, bool) {\n\t// Line 1: p1 to p2\n\t// Line 2: p3 to p4\n\n\tx1, y1 := p1.X, p1.Y\n\tx2, y2 := p2.X, p2.Y\n\tx3, y3 := p3.X, p3.Y\n\tx4, y4 := p4.X, p4.Y\n\n\t// Compute denominator\n\tdenom := (x1-x2)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y2)*(x3-x4)\n\tif math.Abs(denom) < 1e-10 {\n\t\t// Lines are parallel\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute intersection point using parametric form\n\tt := ((x1-x3)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y3)*(x3-x4)) / denom\n\tu := -((x1-x2)*(y1-y3) - (y1-y2)*(x1-x3)) / denom\n\n\t// Check if intersection is within both line segments\n\tif t < 0 || t > 1 || u < 0 || u > 1 {\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute intersection point\n\tintersectX := x1 + t*(x2-x1)\n\tintersectY := y1 + t*(y2-y1)\n\n\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: intersectY}, true\n}\n\n// distance computes Euclidean distance between two points\nfunc distance(a, b Point) float64 {\n\tdx := a.X - b.X\n\tdy := a.Y - b.Y\n\tdz := a.Z - b.Z\n\treturn math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n}\n\n// computeWallLoss computes wall attenuation for a path through all walls.\n// For each wall the path intersects, add the wall's attenuation value.\nfunc computeWallLoss(from, to Point, walls []Wall) float64 {\n\ttotalLoss := 0.0\n\n\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n\t\tif pathIntersectsWall(from.X, from.Y, to.X, to.Y, wall.X1, wall.Y1, wall.X2, wall.Y2) {\n\t\t\ttotalLoss += wall.Attenuation\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn totalLoss\n}\n\n// pathIntersectsWall checks if a path intersects a wall segment (2D)\nfunc pathIntersectsWall(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2 float64) bool {\n\t// Compute orientations\n\tccw := func(ax, ay, bx, by, cx, cy float64) float64 {\n\t\treturn (bx-ax)*(cy-ay) - (by-ay)*(cx-ax)\n\t}\n\n\to1 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1)\n\to2 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx2, wy2)\n\to3 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x1, y1)\n\to4 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x2, y2)\n\n\t// Check for intersection\n\treturn o1*o2 < 0 && o3*o4 < 0\n}\n\n// amplitudeToRSSI converts amplitude to RSSI in dBm\nfunc amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude float64) int8 {\n\t// Convert amplitude to dBm (reference: amplitude 1.0 = -30 dBm)\n\tamplitudeDBm := -30.0 + 20.0*math.Log10(amplitude)\n\n\t// Clamp to realistic range\n\tif amplitudeDBm < -90 {\n\t\tamplitudeDBm = -90\n\t}\n\tif amplitudeDBm > -30 {\n\t\tamplitudeDBm = -30\n\t}\n\n\treturn int8(amplitudeDBm)\n}\n\n// generateIQPair generates a synthetic I/Q pair with Gaussian noise\nfunc generateIQPair(amplitude, phase float64, rng *rand.Rand) (int8, int8) {\n\t// Box-Muller transform for Gaussian noise\n\tu1 := rng.Float64()\n\tu2 := rng.Float64()\n\tz0 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Cos(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n\tz1 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Sin(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n\n\tnoiseI := z0 * *flagNoiseSigma\n\tnoiseQ := z1 * *flagNoiseSigma\n\n\t// Convert to I/Q\n\ti := amplitude*math.Cos(phase) + noiseI\n\tq := amplitude*math.Sin(phase) + noiseQ\n\n\t// Scale to int8 range\n\tscale := 127.0 / 10.0 // Scale factor\n\ti *= scale\n\tq *= scale\n\n\t// Clamp to int8 range [-127, 127]\n\tif i > 127 {\n\t\ti = 127\n\t}\n\tif i < -127 {\n\t\ti = -127\n\t}\n\tif q > 127 {\n\t\tq = 127\n\t}\n\tif q < -127 {\n\t\tq = -127\n\t}\n\n\treturn int8(i), int8(q)\n}\n","numLines":532,"startLine":1,"totalLines":532}}}

{\n172\t\tWidth, Depth, Height float64\n173\t}\n174\t\n175\t// Bounds returns the bounding box of the space\n176\tfunc (s *Space) Bounds() (minX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ float64) {\n177\t\treturn *flagSeed)\n226\t\n227\t\t// Validate channel\n228\t\tif *flagChannel < 1 || *flagChannel > 14 {\n229\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Invalid channel: %d (must be 1-14)\", space.Depth, space.Height)\n251\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Walls: %d\", len(walls))\n252\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   BLE: %v\", *flagBLE)\n253\t\n254\t\t// Output GDOP overlay if requested\n255\t\tif err)\n258\t\t\t}\n259\t\t}\n260\t\n261\t\t// Output shopping list if requested\n262\t\tif *flagShoppingList {\n263\t\t\tif err := outputShoppingList(space, nodes); err != nil {\n264\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to output shopping list: %v\", err)\n265\t\t\t}\n266\t\t}\n267\t\n268\t\t// If only output was requested, exit here\n269\t\tif *flagGDOPOverlay || *flagShoppingList {\n270\t\t\tif !*flagVerify && *flagDuration == 0 {\n271\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Output complete (no simulation requested)\")\n272\t\t\t\tos.Exit(0)\n273\t\t\t}\n274\t\t}\n275\t\n276\t\t// Create scenario configuration\n277\t\tscenarioConfig := &ScenarioConfig{\n278\t\t\tType:      ScenarioType(*flagScenario),\n279\t\t\tStartedAt: time.Now(),\n280\t\t\tFallParams: FallScenarioParams{\n281\t\t\t\tTriggerAfter:      *flagFallDelay,\n282\t\t\t\tDescentDuration:   *flagFallDuration,\n283\t\t\t\tStillnessDuration: *flagStillness,\n284\t\t\t\tMinVelocity:       -1.5, // Below -1.5 m/s threshold\n285\t\t\t\tMinZDrop:          0.8,  // At least 0.8m drop\n286\t\t\t\tEndZ:              0.3,  // Floor level\n287\t\t\t},\n288\t\t\tOTAParams: OTAScenarioParams{\n289\t\t\t\tUpdateAfter:      10 * time.Second,\n290\t\t\t\tFirmwareSize:     *flagOTASize,\n291\t\t\t\tNewVersion:       *flagOTAVersion,\n292\t\t\t\tRebootDelay:      3 * time.Second,\n293\t\t\t\tBootFailDuration: 30 * time.Second,\n294\t\t\t\tSimulateFailure:  *flagOTAFailure,\n295\t\t\t},\n296\t\t}\n297\t\n298\t\t// Create context for shutdown\n299\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n300\t\tdefer cancel()\n301\t\n302\t\t// Handle interrupt signal\n303\t\tsigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n304\t\tsignal.Notify(sigChan, os.Interrupt)\n305\t\n306\t\t// Open CSV writer if specified\n307\t\tvar csvWriter *CSVWriter\n308\t\tif *flagOutputCSV != \"\" {\n309\t\t\tcsvWriter, err = NewCSVWriter(*flagOutputCSV)\n310\t\t\tif err != nil {\n311\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to open CSV file: %v\", err)\n312\t\t\t}\n313\t\t\tdefer func() { _ = csvWriter.Close() }() //nolint:errcheck\n314\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Writing ground truth to %s\", *flagOutputCSV)\n315\t\t}\n316\t\n317\t\t// Start statistics reporter\n318\t\tstats := &Stats{StartTime: time.Now()}\n319\t\tgo reportStats(ctx, stats)\n320\t\n321\t\t// Connect all nodes to mothership\n322\t\tif err := connectNodes(ctx, nodes); err != nil {\n323\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to connect nodes: %v\", err)\n324\t\t}\n325\t\tdefer closeAllNodes(nodes)\n326\t\n327\t\t// Main simulation loop\n328\t\tsimulationComplete := make(chan struct{})\n329\t\tgo runSimulation(ctx, nodes, walkers, space, rng, csvWriter, stats, simulationComplete, scenarioConfig)\n330\t\n331\t\t// Wait for completion or interrupt\n332\t\tvar durationTimer <-chan time.Time\n333\t\tif *flagDuration > 0 {\n334\t\t\tdurationTimer = time.After(time.Duration(*flagDuration) * time.Second)\n335\t\t} else {\n336\t\t\t// Never timeout if duration is 0\n337\t\t\tdurationTimer = make(chan time.Time)\n338\t\t}\n339\t\n340\t\tselect {\n341\t\tcase <-simulationComplete:\n342\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Simulation completed\")\n343\t\tcase <-sigChan:\n344\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Interrupted by user\")\n345\t\t\tcancel()\n346\t\tcase <-durationTimer:\n347\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Duration elapsed\")\n348\t\t\tcancel()\n349\t\t}\n350\t\n351\t\t// Verify blob count if requested\n352\t\tif *flagVerify {\n353\t\t\tif err := verifyBlobs(*flagWalkers, walkers, space); err != nil {\n354\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification FAILED: %v\", err)\n355\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n356\t\t\t}\n357\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification PASSED\")\n358\t\t}\n359\t\n360\t\t// Print final statistics\n361\t\tprintFinalStats(stats, len(walkers))\n362\t}\n363\t\n364\t// parseSpace parses space dimensions from WxDxH format\n365\tfunc parseSpace(s string) (*Space, error) {\n366\t\tparts := strings.Split(s, \"x\")\n367\t\tif len(parts) != 3 {\n368\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"expected WxDxH format, got: %s\", s)\n369\t\t}\n370\t\twidth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[0], 64)\n371\t\tif err != nil {\n372\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid width: %w\", err)\n373\t\t}\n374\t\tdepth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[1], 64)\n375\t\tif err != nil {\n376\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid depth: %w\", err)\n377\t\t}\n378\t\theight, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[2], 64)\n379\t\tif err != nil {\n380\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid height: %w\", err)\n381\t\t}\n382\t\treturn &Space{Width: width, Depth: depth, Height: height}, nil\n383\t}\n384\t\n385\t// createVirtualNodes creates virtual nodes positioned in the space\n386\tfunc createVirtualNodes(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*VirtualNode {\n387\t\tnodes := make([]*VirtualNode, count)\n388\t\n389\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n390\t\t\tnode := &VirtualNode{\n391\t\t\t\tID:   i,\n392\t\t\t\tMAC:  generateMAC(i),\n393\t\t\t\tRole: \"tx_rx\",\n394\t\t\t}\n395\t\n396\t\t\t// Distribute nodes around perimeter\n397\t\t\tperimeter := 2*(space.Width+space.Depth)\n398\t\t\tpos := float64(i) / float64(count) * perimeter\n399\t\n400\t\t\tif pos < space.Width {\n401\t\t\t\t// Bottom edge\n402\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: pos, Y: 0, Z: 2.0}\n403\t\t\t} else if pos < space.Width+space.Depth {\n404\t\t\t\t// Right edge\n405\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width, Y: pos - space.Width, Z: 2.0}\n406\t\t\t} else if pos < 2*space.Width+space.Depth {\n407\t\t\t\t// Top edge\n408\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width - (pos - space.Width - space.Depth), Y: space.Depth, Z: 2.0}\n409\t\t\t} else {\n410\t\t\t\t// Left edge\n411\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: 0, Y: space.Depth - (pos - 2*space.Width - space.Depth), Z: 2.0}\n412\t\t\t}\n413\t\n414\t\t\tnodes[i] = node\n415\t\t}\n416\t\n417\t\treturn nodes\n418\t}\n419\t\n420\t// generateMAC generates a synthetic MAC address for a virtual node\n421\tfunc generateMAC(id int) [6]byte {\n422\t\tvar mac [6]byte\n423\t\tmac[0] = 0xAA\n424\t\tmac[1] = 0xBB\n425\t\tmac[2] = 0xCC\n426\t\tmac[3] = byte((id >> 16) & 0xFF)\n427\t\tmac[4] = byte((id >> 8) & 0xFF)\n428\t\tmac[5] = byte(id & 0xFF)\n429\t\treturn mac\n430\t}\n431\t\n432\t// createWalkers creates synthetic walkers\n433\tfunc createWalkers(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*Walker {\n434\t\twalkerType := WalkerType(*flagWalkerType)\n435\t\n436\t\tif walkerType == WalkerTypePathFollow {\n437\t\t\treturn createPathWalkers(count, space)\n438\t\t}\n439\t\n440\t\tif walkerType == WalkerTypeNodeToNode {\n441\t\t\t// Will be created after nodes are initialized\n442\t\t\treturn nil\n443\t\t}\n444\t\n445\t\t// Default: random walk\n446\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n447\t\n448\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n449\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n450\t\t\t\tID:   i,\n451\t\t\t\tType: WalkerTypeRandomWalk,\n452\t\t\t\tPosition: Point{\n453\t\t\t\t\tX: rng.Float64() * space.Width,\n454\t\t\t\t\tY: rng.Float64() * space.Depth,\n455\t\t\t\t\tZ: 1.7,\n456\t\t\t\t},\n457\t\t\t\tVelocity: Point{\n458\t\t\t\t\tX: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n459\t\t\t\t\tY: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n460\t\t\t\t\tZ: 0,\n461\t\t\t\t},\n462\t\t\t\tSpeed:  0.8 + rng.Float64()*0.4,\n463\t\t\t\tHeight: 1.7,\n464\t\t\t}\n465\t\t}\n466\t\n467\t\treturn walkers\n468\t}\n469\t\n470\t// createPathWalkers creates walkers that follow predefined paths\n471\tfunc createPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n472\t\tif *flagPathFile == \"\" {\n473\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Path-following mode requires --path-file, using default rectangular path\")\n474\t\t\treturn createDefaultPathWalkers(count, space)\n475\t\t}\n476\t\n477\t\t// Load paths from JSON file\n478\t\tpaths, err := loadPathsFromFile(*flagPathFile)\n479\t\tif err != nil {\n480\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to load paths from %s: %v\", *flagPathFile, err)\n481\t\t}\n482\t\n483\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n484\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n485\t\t\t// Use path modulo count to allow fewer paths than walkers\n486\t\t\tpathIdx := i % len(paths)\n487\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n488\t\t\t\tID:      i,\n489\t\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n490\t\t\t\tPath:    paths[pathIdx],\n491\t\t\t\tPathIdx: 0,\n492\t\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n493\t\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n494\t\t\t}\n495\t\t\tif len(paths[pathIdx]) > 0 {\n496\t\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = paths[pathIdx][0]\n497\t\t\t}\n498\t\t}\n499\t\n500\t\treturn walkers\n501\t}\n502\t\n503\t// createDefaultPathWalkers creates walkers following a default rectangular perimeter path\n504\tfunc createDefaultPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n505\t\tmargin := 0.5\n506\t\tpath := []Point{\n507\t\t\t{X: margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n508\t\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n509\t\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n510\t\t\t{X: margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n511\t\t}\n512\t\n513\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n514\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n515\t\t\tstartIdx := (i * len(path) / count) % len(path)\n516\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n517\t\t\t\tID:      i,\n518\t\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n519\t\t\t\tPath:    path,\n520\t\t\t\tPathIdx: startIdx,\n521\t\t\t\tSpeed:   0.8 + 0.4*float64(i)/float64(count),\n522\t\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n523\t\t\t}\n524\t\t\tif len(path) > 0 {\n525\t\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = path[startIdx]\n526\t\t\t}\n527\t\t}\n528\t\n529\t\treturn walkers\n530\t}\n531\t\n532\t// createNodeToNodeWalkers creates walkers that traverse between virtual nodes\n533\tfunc createNodeToNodeWalkers(count int, nodes []*VirtualNode) []*Walker {\n534\t\tif len(nodes) < 2 {\n535\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Node-to-node mode requires at least 2 nodes\")\n536\t\t}\n537\t\n538\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n539\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n540\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n541\t\t\t\tID:      i,\n542\t\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypeNodeToNode,\n543\t\t\t\tNodes:   nodes,\n544\t\t\t\tNodeIdx: 1, // Target is second node\n545\t\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n546\t\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\t\t// Start at first node\n549\t\t\tif len(nodes) > 0 {\n550\t\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = nodes[0].Position\n551\t\t\t}\n552\t\t}\n553\t\n554\t\treturn walkers\n555\t}\n556\t\n557\t// PathDefinition defines a walker path in JSON format\n558\ttype PathDefinition struct {\n559\t\tWaypoints []Point `json:\"waypoints\"` // Ordered list of points to visit\n560\t}\n561\t\n562\t// loadPathsFromFile loads walker paths from a JSON file\n563\tfunc loadPathsFromFile(filename string) ([][]Point, error) {\n564\t\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(filename)\n565\t\tif err != nil {\n566\t\t\treturn nil, err\n567\t\t}\n568\t\n569\t\tvar paths []PathDefinition\n570\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, &paths); err != nil {\n571\t\t\treturn nil, err\n572\t\t}\n573\t\n574\t\tif len(paths) == 0 {\n575\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"no paths defined in file\")\n576\t\t}\n577\t\n578\t\tresult := make([][]Point, len(paths))\n579\t\tfor i, pathDef := range paths {\n580\t\t\tif len(pathDef.Waypoints) == 0 {\n581\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"path %d has no waypoints\", i)\n582\t\t\t}\n583\t\t\tresult[i] = pathDef.Waypoints\n584\t\t}\n585\t\n586\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Loaded %d paths from %s\", len(result), filename)\n587\t\treturn result, nil\n588\t}\n589\t\n590\t// connectNodes connects all virtual nodes to the mothership.\n591\t// Each node gets its own persistent connection with background goroutines\n592\t// for ping, health, and message reading.\n593\tfunc connectNodes(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n594\t\t// Get or generate token\n595\t\ttoken := *flagToken\n596\t\tif token == \"\" {\n597\t\t\tvar err error\n598\t\t\ttoken, err = provisionToken()\n599\t\t\tif err != nil {\n600\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to provision token: %w\", err)\n601\t\t\t}\n602\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Auto-provisioned token: %s...\", token[:min(16, len(token))])\n603\t\t}\n604\t\n605\t\t// Parse mothership URL\n606\t\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n607\t\tif err != nil {\n608\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n609\t\t}\n610\t\n611\t\t// Convert http(s) to ws(s)\n612\t\tif wsURL.Scheme == \"http\" {\n613\t\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"ws\"\n614\t\t} else if wsURL.Scheme == \"https\" {\n615\t\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"wss\"\n616\t\t}\n617\t\n618\t\terrChan := make(chan error, len(nodes))\n619\t\n620\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n621\t\t\t// Add node WS path if needed\n622\t\t\tnodeURL := wsURL.String()\n623\t\t\tif !strings.Contains(nodeURL, \"/ws/\") && !strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/ws\") {\n624\t\t\t\tif strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/\") {\n625\t\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"ws\"\n626\t\t\t\t} else {\n627\t\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"/ws\"\n628\t\t\t\t}\n629\t\t\t}\n630\t\n631\t\t\theaders := http.Header{}\n632\t\t\theaders.Set(\"X-Spaxel-Token\", token)\n633\t\n634\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connecting to %s\", node.ID, nodeURL)\n635\t\n636\t\t\tconn, resp, err := websocket.DefaultDialer.DialContext(ctx, nodeURL, headers)\n637\t\t\tif err != nil {\n638\t\t\t\tif resp != nil {\n639\t\t\t\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n640\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w (status %d: %s)\", node.ID, err, resp.StatusCode, string(body))\n641\t\t\t\t}\n642\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w\", node.ID, err)\n643\t\t\t}\n644\t\n645\t\t\tnode.Conn = conn\n646\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connected\", node.ID)\n647\t\n648\t\t\t// Send hello message\n649\t\t\thello := map[string]interface{}{\n650\t\t\t\t\"type\":             \"hello\",\n651\t\t\t\t\"mac\":              macToString(node.MAC),\n652\t\t\t\t\"firmware_version\": \"sim-1.0.0\",\n653\t\t\t\t\"capabilities\":     []string{\"csi\", \"tx\", \"rx\"},\n654\t\t\t\t\"chip\":             \"ESP32-S3\",\n655\t\t\t\t\"flash_mb\":         16,\n656\t\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":        1000,\n657\t\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi\":        -45,\n658\t\t\t\t\"ip\":               fmt.Sprintf(\"127.0.0.%d\", node.ID+2),\n659\t\t\t}\n660\t\n661\t\t\thelloBytes, err := json.Marshal(hello)\n662\t\t\tif err != nil {\n663\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n664\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d marshal hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n665\t\t\t}\n666\t\n667\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n668\t\t\terr = conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, helloBytes)\n669\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n670\t\n671\t\t\tif err != nil {\n672\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n673\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d send hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n674\t\t\t}\n675\t\n676\t\t\t// Wait for role assignment\n677\t\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(10 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n678\t\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n679\t\t\tif err != nil {\n680\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n681\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d read role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n682\t\t\t}\n683\t\n684\t\t\tvar roleMsg map[string]interface{}\n685\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &roleMsg); err != nil {\n686\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n687\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d parse role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n688\t\t\t}\n689\t\n690\t\t\tif roleMsg[\"type\"] == \"reject\" {\n691\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n692\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"reason\"])\n693\t\t\t}\n694\t\n695\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received role: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"role\"])\n696\t\n697\t\t\t// Start background goroutines for this connection\n698\t\t\tstartTime := time.Now()\n699\t\t\tgo node.pingLoop(ctx)\n700\t\t\tgo node.healthLoop(ctx, startTime)\n701\t\t\tgo node.readLoop(ctx, errChan)\n702\t\t}\n703\t\n704\t\treturn nil\n705\t}\n706\t\n707\t// provisionToken provisions a token. Tries the mothership API first,\n708\t// falls back to a synthetic HMAC token.\n709\tfunc provisionToken() (string, error) {\n710\t\t// Parse mothership URL to get HTTP endpoint\n711\t\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n712\t\tif err != nil {\n713\t\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n714\t\t}\n715\t\n716\t\thttpURL := *wsURL\n717\t\tif httpURL.Scheme == \"ws\" {\n718\t\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"http\"\n719\t\t} else if httpURL.Scheme == \"wss\" {\n720\t\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"https\"\n721\t\t}\n722\t\n723\t\t// Trim /ws suffix to get base URL\n724\t\tbaseURL := strings.TrimSuffix(httpURL.String(), \"/ws\")\n725\t\tbaseURL = strings.TrimSuffix(baseURL, \"/\")\n726\t\tprovisionURL := baseURL + \"/api/provision\"\n727\t\n728\t\t// Try POST /api/provision with synthetic credentials\n729\t\tbody := strings.NewReader(`{\"mac\":\"AA:BB:CC:00:00:00\"}`)\n730\t\tresp, err := http.Post(provisionURL, \"application/json\", body)\n731\t\tif err == nil && resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK {\n732\t\t\tvar result map[string]interface{}\n733\t\t\tif json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result) == nil {\n734\t\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n735\t\t\t\tif token, ok := result[\"node_token\"].(string); ok && token != \"\" {\n736\t\t\t\t\treturn token, nil\n737\t\t\t\t}\n738\t\t\t}\n739\t\t}\n740\t\tif resp != nil {\n741\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n742\t\t}\n743\t\n744\t\t// Fallback: generate synthetic token\n745\t\th := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(\"sim-install-secret\"))\n746\t\th.Write([]byte(\"sim-node\"))\n747\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%064x\", h.Sum(nil)), nil\n748\t}\n749\t\n750\t// closeAllNodes closes all node WebSocket connections\n751\tfunc closeAllNodes(nodes []*VirtualNode) {\n752\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n753\t\t\tif node.Conn != nil {\n754\t\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n755\t\t\t\tnode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage, //nolint:errcheck\n756\t\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.CloseNormalClosure, \"sim shutdown\"))\n757\t\t\t\tnode.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n758\t\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n759\t\t\t}\n760\t\t}\n761\t}\n762\t\n763\t// macToString converts a 6-byte MAC to colon-separated hex\n764\tfunc macToString(mac [6]byte) string {\n765\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X\",\n766\t\t\tmac[0], mac[1], mac[2], mac[3], mac[4], mac[5])\n767\t}\n768\t\n769\t// pingLoop sends WebSocket pings\n770\tfunc (n *VirtualNode) pingLoop(ctx context.Context) {\n771\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n772\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n773\t\n774\t\tfor {\n775\t\t\tselect {\n776\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n777\t\t\t\treturn\n778\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n779\t\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n780\t\t\t\terr := n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.PingMessage, nil)\n781\t\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n782\t\n783\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n784\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d ping failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n785\t\t\t\t\treturn\n786\t\t\t\t}\n787\t\t\t}\n788\t\t}\n789\t}\n790\t\n791\t// healthLoop sends periodic health messages\n792\tfunc (n *VirtualNode) healthLoop(ctx context.Context, startTime time.Time) {\n793\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n794\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n795\t\n796\t\tfor {\n797\t\t\tselect {\n798\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n799\t\t\t\treturn\n800\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n801\t\t\t\thealth := map[string]interface{}{\n802\t\t\t\t\t\"type\":            \"health\",\n803\t\t\t\t\t\"mac\":             macToString(n.MAC),\n804\t\t\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":    time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n805\t\t\t\t\t\"free_heap_bytes\": 200000,\n806\t\t\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi_dbm\":   -45,\n807\t\t\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":       time.Since(startTime).Milliseconds(),\n808\t\t\t\t\t\"csi_rate_hz\":     *flagRate,\n809\t\t\t\t\t\"wifi_channel\":    *flagChannel,\n810\t\t\t\t}\n811\t\n812\t\t\t\thealthBytes, err := json.Marshal(health)\n813\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n814\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal health: %v\", n.ID, err)\n815\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n816\t\t\t\t}\n817\t\n818\t\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n819\t\t\t\terr = n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, healthBytes)\n820\t\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n821\t\n822\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n823\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send health failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n824\t\t\t\t\treturn\n825\t\t\t\t}\n826\t\t\t}\n827\t\t}\n828\t}\n829\t\n830\t// readLoop reads downstream messages from the WebSocket\n831\tfunc (n *VirtualNode) readLoop(ctx context.Context, errChan chan<- error) {\n832\t\tfor {\n833\t\t\tselect {\n834\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n835\t\t\t\treturn\n836\t\t\tdefault:\n837\t\t\t}\n838\t\n839\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n840\t\t\tconn := n.Conn\n841\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n842\t\n843\t\t\tif conn == nil {\n844\t\t\t\treturn\n845\t\t\t}\n846\t\n847\t\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(60 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n848\t\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n849\t\t\tif err != nil {\n850\t\t\t\tselect {\n851\t\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n852\t\t\t\t\treturn\n853\t\t\t\tdefault:\n854\t\t\t\t}\n855\t\t\t\tif websocket.IsCloseError(err) {\n856\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connection closed\", n.ID)\n857\t\t\t\t\treturn\n858\t\t\t\t}\n859\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d read error: %v\", n.ID, err)\n860\t\t\t\treturn\n861\t\t\t}\n862\t\n863\t\t\tvar msg map[string]interface{}\n864\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &msg); err != nil {\n865\t\t\t\tcontinue\n866\t\t\t}\n867\t\n868\t\t\tmsgType, ok := msg[\"type\"].(string)\n869\t\t\tif !ok {\n870\t\t\t\tcontinue\n871\t\t\t}\n872\t\n873\t\t\tswitch msgType {\n874\t\t\tcase \"role\":\n875\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d role update: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"role\"])\n876\t\t\tcase \"config\":\n877\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d config update: %v\", n.ID, msg)\n878\t\t\tcase \"reject\":\n879\t\t\t\terrChan <- fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"reason\"])\n880\t\t\t\treturn\n881\t\t\tcase \"shutdown\":\n882\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received shutdown\", n.ID)\n883\t\t\t\treturn\n884\t\t\t}\n885\t\t}\n886\t}\n887\t\n888\t// runSimulation runs the main CSI generation loop\n889\tfunc runSimulation(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand, csvWriter *CSVWriter, stats *Stats, done chan<- struct{}, scenario *ScenarioConfig) {\n890\t\tdefer close(done)\n891\t\n892\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(time.Duration(1000/(*flagRate)) * time.Millisecond)\n893\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n894\t\n895\t\tframeNum := 0\n896\t\tlastBLETime := time.Now()\n897\t\n898\t\t// Initialize fall scenario state\n899\t\tvar fallState *FallScenarioState\n900\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall || scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n901\t\t\tif len(walkers) > 0 {\n902\t\t\t\tfallState = &FallScenarioState{\n903\t\t\t\t\tWalker: walkers[0],\n904\t\t\t\t\tState:  \"walking\",\n905\t\t\t\t}\n906\t\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n907\t\t\t\t\t// For bag-on-couch, start with a lower position\n908\t\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Position.Z = 1.0\n909\t\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Velocity.Z = -0.2 // Slow descent\n910\t\t\t\t}\n911\t\t\t}\n912\t\t}\n913\t\n914\t\t// Track scenario timing\n915\t\tscenarioStarted := false\n916\t\n917\t\tfor {\n918\t\t\tselect {\n919\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n920\t\t\t\treturn\n921\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n922\t\t\t\t// Handle fall scenario timing\n923\t\t\t\tif fallState != nil && !scenarioStarted && time.Since(scenario.StartedAt) >= scenario.FallParams.TriggerAfter {\n924\t\t\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall {\n925\t\t\t\t\t\tfallState.StartFall(scenario.FallParams)\n926\t\t\t\t\t\tscenarioStarted = true\n927\t\t\t\t\t}\n928\t\t\t\t}\n929\t\n930\t\t\t\t// Update walker positions\n931\t\t\t\tif fallState != nil {\n932\t\t\t\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n933\t\t\t\t\tfallState.UpdateForFallScenario(dt, scenario.FallParams, space, rng)\n934\t\t\t\t} else {\n935\t\t\t\t\tupdateWalkers(walkers, space, rng)\n936\t\t\t\t}\n937\t\n938\t\t\t\t// Write to CSV\n939\t\t\t\tif csvWriter != nil {\n940\t\t\t\t\tcsvWriter.WriteRow(walkers, nodes, walls)\n941\t\t\t\t}\n942\t\n943\t\t\t\t// Send CSI frames for each node pair\n944\t\t\t\tfor _, txNode := range nodes {\n945\t\t\t\t\tfor _, rxNode := range nodes {\n946\t\t\t\t\t\tif txNode.ID == rxNode.ID {\n947\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n948\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n949\t\n950\t\t\t\t\t\tframe := generateCSIFrame(txNode, rxNode, walkers, walls, frameNum, rng)\n951\t\n952\t\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Lock()\n953\t\t\t\t\t\terr := txNode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.BinaryMessage, frame)\n954\t\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Unlock()\n955\t\n956\t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n957\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send CSI failed: %v\", txNode.ID, err)\n958\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n959\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n960\t\n961\t\t\t\t\t\tstats.FramesSent.Add(1)\n962\t\t\t\t\t}\n963\t\t\t\t}\n964\t\n965\t\t\t\t// Send BLE messages if enabled\n966\t\t\t\tif *flagBLE && time.Since(lastBLETime) > 5*time.Second {\n967\t\t\t\t\tsendBLEMessages(nodes, walkers)\n968\t\t\t\t\tlastBLETime = time.Now()\n969\t\t\t\t}\n970\t\n971\t\t\t\tframeNum++\n972\t\t\t}\n973\t\t}\n974\t}\n975\t\n976\t// updateWalkers updates walker positions based on their movement type\n977\tfunc updateWalkers(walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n978\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n979\t\n980\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n981\t\t\tswitch walker.Type {\n982\t\t\tcase WalkerTypePathFollow:\n983\t\t\t\tupdatePathWalker(walker, dt)\n984\t\t\tcase WalkerTypeNodeToNode:\n985\t\t\t\tupdateNodeToNodeWalker(walker, dt, space)\n986\t\t\tcase WalkerTypeRandomWalk:\n987\t\t\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rng)\n988\t\t\t}\n989\t\t}\n990\t}\n991\t\n992\t// updateRandomWalker implements random walk motion\n993\tfunc updateRandomWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n994\t\twalker.Position.X += walker.Velocity.X * dt\n995\t\twalker.Position.Y += walker.Velocity.Y * dt\n996\t\n997\t\t// Bounce off walls\n998\t\tmargin := 0.2\n999\t\tif walker.Position.X < margin {\n1000\t\t\twalker.Position.X = margin\n1001\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n1002\t\t}\n1003\t\tif walker.Position.X > space.Width-margin {\n1004\t\t\twalker.Position.X = space.Width - margin\n1005\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n1006\t\t}\n1007\t\tif walker.Position.Y < margin {\n1008\t\t\twalker.Position.Y = margin\n1009\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n1010\t\t}\n1011\t\tif walker.Position.Y > space.Depth-margin {\n1012\t\t\twalker.Position.Y = space.Depth - margin\n1013\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n1014\t\t}\n1015\t\n1016\t\t// Random velocity perturbation\n1017\t\tperturbation := 0.1\n1018\t\twalker.Velocity.X += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n1019\t\twalker.Velocity.Y += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n1020\t\n1021\t\t// Clamp velocity\n1022\t\tspeed := walker.Speed * (0.5 + rng.Float64()*0.5)\n1023\t\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(walker.Velocity.X*walker.Velocity.X + walker.Velocity.Y*walker.Velocity.Y)\n1024\t\tif currentSpeed > 0 {\n1025\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (walker.Velocity.X / currentSpeed) * speed\n1026\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (walker.Velocity.Y / currentSpeed) * speed\n1027\t\t}\n1028\t\n1029\t\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n1030\t}\n1031\t\n1032\t// updatePathWalker implements path-following motion\n1033\tfunc updatePathWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64) {\n1034\t\tif len(walker.Path) == 0 {\n1035\t\t\treturn\n1036\t\t}\n1037\t\n1038\t\ttarget := walker.Path[walker.PathIdx]\n1039\t\tdx := target.X - walker.Position.X\n1040\t\tdy := target.Y - walker.Position.Y\n1041\t\tdz := target.Z - walker.Position.Z\n1042\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n1043\t\n1044\t\t// If very close to target, move to next waypoint\n1045\t\tif dist < 0.1 {\n1046\t\t\twalker.PathIdx = (walker.PathIdx + 1) % len(walker.Path)\n1047\t\t\treturn\n1048\t\t}\n1049\t\n1050\t\t// Move towards target at constant speed\n1051\t\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n1052\t\tif moveDist > dist {\n1053\t\t\tmoveDist = dist\n1054\t\t}\n1055\t\n1056\t\tt := moveDist / dist\n1057\t\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n1058\t\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n1059\t\n1060\t\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n1061\t\tif dist > 0 {\n1062\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / dist) * walker.Speed\n1063\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / dist) * walker.Speed\n1064\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n1065\t\t}\n1066\t}\n1067\t\n1068\t// updateNodeToNodeWalker implements traversal between virtual nodes\n1069\tfunc updateNodeToNodeWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space) {\n1070\t\tif len(walker.Nodes) < 2 {\n1071\t\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())))\n1072\t\t\treturn\n1073\t\t}\n1074\t\n1075\t\ttargetNode := - walker.Position.Z\n1081\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n1082\t\n1083\t\t// Check if we've arrived at the target node (horizontal distance)\n1084\t\thorizontalDist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)\n1085\t\tif horizontalDist < 0.3 {\n1086\t\t\t// Move to next node\n1087\t\t\twalker.NodeIdx = (walker.NodeIdx + 1) % len(walker.Nodes)\n1088\t\t\treturn\n1089\t\t}\n1090\t\n1091\t\t// Move towards target node\n1092\t\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n1093\t\tif moveDist > horizontalDist {\n1094\t\t\tmoveDist = horizontalDist\n1095\t\t}\n1096\t\n1097\t\tt := moveDist / horizontalDist\n1098\t\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n1099\t\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n1100\t\n1101\t\t// Update velocity vector\n1102\t\tif horizontalDist > 0 {\n1103\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n1104\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n1105\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n1106\t\t}\n1107\t\n1108\t\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n1109\t}\n1110\t\n1111\t// sendBLEMessages sends synthetic BLE scan results\n1112\tfunc sendBLEMessages(nodes []*VirtualNode, String() string { return \"\" }\nfunc (w *wallFlag) Set(value string) error {\n\t// Format: x1,y1,x2,y2[:material]\n\tparts := strings.Split(value, \",\")\n\tif len(parts) < 4 {\n\t\treturn (default: drywall)\n\tmaterial := MaterialDrywall\n\tattenuation := 3.0\n\tif len(parts) >= 5 {\n\t\tmaterial = WallMaterial(strings.ToLower(parts[4]))\n\t\tswitch material {\n\t\tcase
